Off Calendar Jan-03-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Labib Barance and Edward Novak representing Appellant/Defendant Auto 360, Inc. present.
Respondant/Plaintiff Kendall Freeman also present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.

Respondant/Plaintiff Kendall Freeman testifies on his own behalf.

Labib Barance testifies on behalf of Appellant/Defendant Auto 360, Inc.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission. No exhibits filed.

VJ Wallace P. Douglass, Clerk: Vicki Mack, Not Reported (Dept. 303)
